testcase.system-err: Failed to delete users ce1e1280-3a38-4ded-96c0-5a67318da08d: 500 {"status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","message":"An unexpected error occurred","path":"/api/test/users/ce1e1280-3a38-4ded-96c0-5a67318da08d","timestamp":"2026-06-13T17:52:48.001014132Z"}
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › us-824-quick-actions.spec.ts:139:3 › US-824: Quick Actions Panel › US-824 AC-4: Track Shipments button navigates to /dashboard/shipper/loads
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /\/dashboard\/shipper\/loads/ Received string: "http://localhost:9090/" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "http://localhost:9090/"
159 | await trackBtn.click(); 160 | > 161 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/dashboard\/shipper\/loads/, { timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 162 | console.log('✅ Track Shipments button navigates correctly'); 163 | } finally { 164 | await seeder.cleanup(); at /app/e2e/us-824-quick-actions.spec.ts:161:26
